## Type of change

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm run check` passes (lint + typecheck + test)
- [ ] Added/updated tests (including edge cases)
- [ ] Added a changeset (`pnpm changeset`) if this is a user-facing change
- [ ] Updated the README / docs if behaviour changed
